reference: These days I am undergoing investigation for my chronic jaundice problem. My doctor has prescribed a lot of blood tests, Magnetic Resonance Cholangiopancreatography, Computed Tomography of the chest, and a biopsy of the liver. Two days ago, he sent me to a chest physician for his opinion because in my chest Computed Tomography report, the lymph node is enlarged and also large in my abdomen. My doctor wants his opinion in making a decision to diagnose my condition between tuberculosis and sarcoidosis. So please help me.
text: He states I am undergoing investigation for my chronic jaundice problem; my doctor has prescribed a lot of blood tests, magnetic resonance cholangio-pancreatopy, computed tomography of the chest, and a biopsy of the liver. Two days ago he sent me to a chest physician for his opinion because in my chest CT report the lymph node is enlarged and also large in my abdomen. My doctor wants his opinion making a decision to diagnose my condition between tuberculosis and sarcoidosis, so please help me.
